## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (lint + test + build + audit)
- [ ] No `.env` files or real API keys committed
- [ ] UI changes use the cream (`#FAF8F3`) / terracotta (`#BF4E32`) palette
- [ ] Wallet copy uses `this wallet` / `this address` — not `your wallet` / `you`
- [ ] One issue or feature per PR (no bundled unrelated changes)
